replies.msg:
Morning Consult National Tracking Poll 5/31 - 6/1
1624 選民樣本 +-2% margin of error
https://assets.morningconsult.com/wp-uploads/2020/06/01181629/2005131_crosstabs_POLICE_RVs_FINAL_LM-1.pdf

重點總結：
71％美國選民支持動用國民警衛軍支援popo，以應對各地抗議示威
（調查用protests and demonstrations一詞 而非riot）

42％選民 “strongly support”，29％ “somewhat support” 動員國民警衛軍
11％“strongly oppose”，9％ “somewhat oppose” 動員國民警衛軍

共和黨人比民主黨人更支持動員National Guard
但民主黨人亦有絕大多數（63％）“strongly” or “somewhat” support the use of National Guard

非裔美國人對National Guard態度呈均勢分歧
43％非裔選民either “strongly” or “somewhat” oppose the use of National Guard
42％非裔選民either “strongly” or “somewhat” support the use of National Guard

西班牙裔選民整體支持動員國民警衛軍
25％的西班牙裔選民either “strongly” or “somewhat” oppose the use of National Guard
54％的西班牙裔選民either “strongly” or “somewhat” support the use of National Guard

過半選民（58％）支持動員美軍（Military）支援popo

共和黨人比民主黨人更支持動員美軍
而民主黨人則呈分歧，48％支持軍隊，而43％反對。

唔怪得侵仔啱先tweet silent majority得戚到佢
數據po冇人理

我都知網上comment同現實個民意不符
但係twitter支持共和黨既人比民主黨既人少勁多
BTW 都有成63％民主黨人支持出National Guard
越亂越對侵有利
多謝你出啲真新聞嘅post
個民調同Twitter兩個世界

New York Gov. Andrew Cuomo on Tuesday slammed New York City Mayor Bill de Blasio's handling of riots in his city, calling it a "disgrace" and saying he has the power to "displace" the mayor -- although doesn't want to at this point.

Cuomo spoke after another night of devastation in the Big Apple, after protests in response to the death of George Floyd again devolved into riots and looting. The New York City Police Department tells Fox News that 700 arrests were made overnight. A half dozen police officers were injured, while at least six police vehicles were vandalized.

Cuomo said at a press conference that the mayor "underestimates" the scope and duration of the problem, suggesting he needs to deploy more police.


In an extraordinary statement, he went on to say his "option is to displace the mayor ... bring in the National Guard" and essentially "take over." However, he said, "I don't think we're at that point."

Morning Consult National Tracking Poll 5/31 - 6/1
1624 選民樣本 +-2% margin of error
https://assets.morningconsult.com/wp-uploads/2020/06/01181629/2005131_crosstabs_POLICE_RVs_FINAL_LM-1.pdf

重點總結：
71％美國選民支持動用國民警衛軍支援popo，以應對各地抗議示威
（調查用protests and demonstrations一詞 而非riot）

42％選民 “strongly support”，29％ “somewhat support” 動員國民警衛軍
11％“strongly oppose”，9％ “somewhat oppose” 動員國民警衛軍

共和黨人比民主黨人更支持動員National Guard
但民主黨人亦有絕大多數（63％）“strongly” or “somewhat” support the use of National Guard

非裔美國人對National Guard態度呈均勢分歧
43％非裔選民either “strongly” or “somewhat” oppose the use of National Guard
42％非裔選民either “strongly” or “somewhat” support the use of National Guard

西班牙裔選民整體支持動員國民警衛軍
25％的西班牙裔選民either “strongly” or “somewhat” oppose the use of National Guard
54％的西班牙裔選民either “strongly” or “somewhat” support the use of National Guard

過半選民（58％）支持動員美軍（Military）支援popo

共和黨人比民主黨人更支持動員美軍
而民主黨人則呈分歧，48％支持軍隊，而43％反對。
